programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword. Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot. Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard. The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Society of Ultimate Villainy causes chaos, creating challenges for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee tracks a traitor, remembering his first meeting with Bulkhead at Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Blackarachnia recruits Prometheus Black for an unknown, sinister purpose.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot refuses to let the children accompany them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet's experiment with synthetic Energon turns him into a threat to all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A prophecy wounds a hero and triggers a long-awaited Optimus-Megatron battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dark Energon eruptions alert Autobots to a deeper threat within Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots seek to stop Unicron without destroying Earth help comes unexpectedly.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 1
programme.desc: Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: The Key to Vector Sigma, Part 2
programme.desc: The Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Flying Bed: Gargamel casts a spell on Papa's new bed so anyone who sleeps in it is transported to the location of his dream. The drowsy Smurfs' fantasies lead them to a private ship, a castle and finally to Gargamel's. They escape when Clumsy falls asleep and dreams of home.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Chip Off The Old Smurf: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Root Of Evil: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Brainy Smurf, Friend To All Animals
programme.desc: Brainy dons his safari hat and roams the forest to do good deeds for animals. He mostly gives advice to the creatures but balks when he can really save the life of a wildcat being hunted by Gargamel. Nat gives Brainy the courage to free the cat from Gargamel's trap.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Clockwork Smurfette: Clockwork Smurf is feeling so lonely that, out of compassion, Handy Smurf builds a female companion for him. The trouble is, Clockwork Smurfette does not know she's supposed to have eyes only for her mechanical counterpart, or that she should avoid Gargamel....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Scruple And The Great Book Of Spells: When Scruple, helper to the evil Gargamel, finds the Great Book of Spells in his master's cellar, he asks for the power to be the world's most powerful wizard. This means trouble for the poor little Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Little Smurf Confidence: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Snappy's Way
programme.desc: Did you know that if you catch a troll, he may grant you one wish? It just happens that Aloysius the Troll gets caught in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. Snappy Smurf sets him free and as a reward, gets to make all other Smurfs obey his every whim. Now this brings a lot of trouble to the Smurfs, as Smurflings, sometimes, ask for things that are not good for them... or anybody else.

programme.title: Don Smurfo
programme.desc: Everyone has their own dreams. That of Smurfette is to meet the legendary Don Smurfo, the dashing, witty, swashbuckling hero of many an engrossing tale. The Smurfs shrug at this infatuation. But when a real-life Don Smurfo appears in the village and Smurfette snubs them all in favor of the bragging stranger, they take the matter a little more seriously.

programme.title: Smurf On The Run
programme.desc: Little things can sometimes bring about big effects. In trying to catch Sassette, Gargamel upsets the Balance of Truth, and from then on everybody in the world tells lies. Even Papa Smurf is changed into a pathological liar. What is more, the Spirit of the Scales chain Gargamel and Sassette to each other, and together they have to replace the Topaz of Truth....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfs That Time Forgot: Being kind to animals brings unforeseen results for the Smurfs when they decide to bring a baby dinosaur back home... in its own era! This is the start of a series that spans space and time.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Swapping Smurfs: In trying to avoid doing his chores, Lazy Smurf finds an old abandoned well with an interesting peculiarity: anything that goes down in the bucket comes back up in its original brand-new condition. But is it good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: S1 Critter Chaos
programme.desc: Animals, fleas and farmyard madness spark wild Rabbid antics.

programme.title: S2 Creature Bwah‑niverse
programme.desc: Feathers, claws and critter chaos as Rabbids meet wild new friends.

programme.title: Critter Chaos & Creature Capers
programme.desc: Creatures big and small spark wild Rabbid antics in a lively mix of pets, farm life and animal mayhem.

programme.title: Beware the Bwah‑gic
programme.desc: Supernatural surprises unfold as Rabbids encounter séances, creatures, dream worlds and strange transformations.

programme.title: Rabbids: Dance‑Off Disaster
programme.desc: The Rabbids wiggle, stumble and go wild in a hilariously chaotic musical mess.

programme.title: S3 Creature Chaos 2.0
programme.desc: Beasts, bugs and bizarre critters spark nonstop Rabbid mayhem.

programme.title: S3 Quest Mode Bwah
programme.desc: Epic missions and wild challenges push Rabbids into full quest mode.

programme.title: Hat Trick
programme.desc: The Bear is desperately struggling against the greedy moth, which appeared in his house. Trying to save his magic box, he puts it on the porch, and Masha finds the magic hat that can make her invisible ...

programme.title: Stripes And Whiskers
programme.desc: The Circus Tiger visits his old friend Bear. The whiskered and stripped cat is utterly bewildered by Masha's behavior and tries everything to get rid of her. Nevertheless his changes his mind when he gets lost in the forest and Masha saves in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Spanish Tunes
programme.desc: The bear is ready for anything to please Masha and She-Bear, even to become a mysterious and unpredictable Spaniard for a day. They travel to an amazing and hospitable country, where passions are seething to the sounds of the guitar and the clicking of a castanets.

programme.title: Pink of Fashion
programme.desc: You don't have to go to Paris to be fashionable. It's enough to ask for help from your best friend. France will share an amazing taste in clothes and a thirst for life with Masha.

programme.title: From England with Love
programme.desc: A new lovely friend from foggy England got lost in the forest. Masha acts like a real Robin Hood. She wants to help this lost soul to return home. Meanwhile, the eternally hungry Wolves are trying to get to our guest.

programme.title: Horrifying Story Of Grandmother And Grandson
programme.desc: It happens that grown-up people have their own fears! For example, one grandmother was very afraid not to please her grandson. Whatever she cooked- nothing was good enough for him. Once she tried to give him a tomato, but he just threw it towards the wall! Grandma was very upset and left the house. And so he was left alone and scared- there was no one home! Much fear he had suffered until his grandmother came back! This terrible trick taught him a worthy lesson so nevertheless he was cranky ever after and ate with a terrible appetite!

programme.title: A Ghost Bike Saga Which Makes You Shiver
programme.desc: You think no one could ever be afraid of a bike...Today, you will hear an incredible... and amazing heartbreaking story... about a bicycle! There was one boy called Gosha, who was very upset when he got bicycle for his birthday as he once imagined himself rushing down the street riding that huge two-wheeled scary monster! But in reality it's so simple to ride a bike without any worries...isn't it?

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Super Scary Story Of A Little Boy Who Was Afraid Of Washing
programme.desc: One boy was so afraid of the water that he stopped washing himself and turned into a piggy! All his buddies ran away from him scared! But in the end he overcame his fear and began to wash his face and hands as he realized that the water can be safe and fun! The boy was very brave and even won a swimming competition!

programme.title: Horrible True Story Of How A Boy Was Transferred To Another School
programme.desc: Today you will hear a story which you haven't heard before…about one boy who was transferred to another school! He was terrified so much because he thought that another strange school is full of monster-looking teachers, gym classes where you have to fight without rules and classmates-bullies! But in reality there was nothing to be afraid of because all the schools are practically the same- with normal classmates and teachers who are always ready to make you feel comfortable!

programme.title: Creepy Tale About Useful Inventions
programme.desc: Here is another spooky story about useful inventions that might nonetheless ruin your life…just imagine…what if there is mega brain who wants to conquer the Earth with some mechanical monsters?! You might think it's a joke, but there are so many gadgets around you, can you guarantee that you are safe? Ok, ok, relax, Masha will find a way out! Oh, yeah!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Coming Back Ain't Easy
programme.desc: The Bear hates to say goodbye to Masha and can't stand being apart. Meanwhile, other forest dwellers are chilling in the yard not knowing that this fragile paradise is on the verge of collapse as the Bear receives a long-awaited phone call from Masha…

programme.title: New Kids on the Block!
programme.desc: Masha enthusiastically plays with her "dolls", but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Masha's care. Rosie enjoys adult life, but everything is not that simple ...

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: When a Pig Flies
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of such appetizing and ripe acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly. It's good there is Masha around, who knows for sure it is always useful to dream.

programme.title: Soup Pursuit
programme.desc: The wolves are going to cook borscht under Masha's guidance. They have a cookbook, a big pot and a ravenous appetite. But they still gotta get the ingredients! It seems that the newly-minted culinary specialists will get something interesting going on.

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: Sabre-Toothed Bear
programme.desc: Everyone is curious to know more details about their ancestors: what they were like, what did they do… Once upon a time the Bear took an interest in how his progenitor Bear could look like. In order to answer this question the Bear has to invent and build…guess what? - a real time machine! And, of course, Masha could not miss such a discovery!

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: Call Me Please!
programme.desc: A funny interpretation of an old fable about a boy who called for help and shouted “Wolves!”. The Bear wants to watch a soccer game but first he needs to get rid of the girl. The Bear sends her foe a walk to the forest and gave her a cell phone in order to be safe. As a result Masha annoys him with her calls for any trivial reasons and when she finds herself in real danger, the Bear doesn't answer the phone …

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.desc: Ash and friends meet a Trainer whose Yanma is blamed for breaking windows.

The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.desc: A bounty hunter travels to the Amazon to retrieve the son of a mob boss.

programme.title: Bogus

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.desc: When Arthur and Martha find that their pension pot is virtually worthless they decide to take drastic action by robbing a bank! After their first robbery is successful they start to like the criminal lifestyle, but as the robberies get riskier will they be able to outwit the police as they close in?

programme.title: Everything Must Go
programme.desc: After delivering an inspiring presentation to his sales staff, Nick is fired for falling off the wagon one last time. He returns home to discover his wife has left him, changed the locks on their suburban home and dumped all his possessions out on the front yard.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: The Young and Prodigious T.S. Spivet
programme.desc: T.S is a 12 year-old prodigy with a passion for cartography and scientific inventions. One day, he receives an unexpected call from the Smithsonian museum telling him that he is the winner of a very prestigious prize.

programme.desc: Nine-year-old Mary lives in a home filled with lovely things and loneliness. Bothered by bratty brother Max and neglected by well intentioned, but distracted, parents, she yearns for companionship. On Christmas Eve, Mary's Uncle Albert arrives with the gift of a wooden nutcracker doll…

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Deadly Voltage
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-Fi action with Mike Dopud. A fractured family is caught up in a lethal lightning storm. Amidst the terror and destruction, can they find a way to unite and survive?

programme.title: Burning Lies
programme.desc: (2021) Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly.

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: (2015) Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster?

programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Bedazzled

programme.title: Miss Juneteenth
programme.desc: Turquoise, a former beauty queen turned hardworking single mother, prepares her rebellious teenage daughter for the Miss Juneteenth pageant, hoping to keep her from repeating the same mistakes in life that she did.

programme.title: God's Own Country
programme.desc: Johnny Saxby (Josh O'Connor) works long hours on his family's remote farm in the north of England. He numbs the daily frustration of his lonely existence with nightly binge-drinking at the local pub and casual sex.

programme.title: Mothers Of The Bride
programme.desc: Jenna is getting married, her mother is delighted until Jenna announces she wants to find her birth mother.

programme.title: Killing Dad
programme.desc: A man always very devoted to his mother decides to look for his father, whom he never met. He meets a seductive older woman prone to drinking and her aged boyfriend, with whom she has grown tired.

programme.desc: A spoof of 300 (2006) and many other movies, TV series/shows/commercials, video games and celebrities. King Leonidas of Sparta and his army of 12 go to war against Xerxes of Persia to fight to the death for Sparta's freedom.

programme.title: Made In America

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.

programme.title: Gladiatress
programme.desc: 55BC Somewhere In Britain: The Princesses of the Dubonni tribe are three unlikely sisters: Smirgut The Fierce (Fiona Allen), ferocious warrior and full-time mum, Dwyfuc (Doon Mackichan), desperate spinster in search of a hairy husband and Worthaboutapig (Sally Phillips), clumsy village bee-herder. Roman soldiers kidnap Dwyfuc, detaining her in Boulogne. Seduced by Roman society, she reveals locations of British ports crucial to the Romanss invasion strategy. Smirgut and Worthaboutapig set out on a perilous rescue mission together they must prevent the downfall of Celtic Britain, encountering gods, lawyers, soothsayers, barbarians and the Otherworld. Girl power is alive and kicking and ready to take on the Romans

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Hitman Redemption
programme.desc: The executive producer of Mudbound brings you this slick, gun-toting neo-noir thriller. Asher (Ron Perlman: Hellboy), a former Mossad agent turned gun for hire, lives an austere life in an ever-changing Brooklyn. He breaks the oath he took as a young man upon meeting Sophie (Famke Janssen: X-Men) on a hit gone wrong. For love, he must kill the man he was, to become the man he wants to be.

programme.title: Escape Plan II
programme.desc: Strap yourself in for the second installment of the electrifying action franchise, with on-screen forces Sylvester Stallone and Dave Bautista. Years after Ray Breslin fought his way out of an escape-proof prison, he's organised a new top-notch, for-hire security force that includes some of the best in the business. But when one of his team goes missing, Ray ventures back into the secret lock-up.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: One church. One priest. A wounded man and his loaded gun. An intense-thriller played in real time where a vengeful confession must take place. Father Peter (Colm Meaney, Con Air) is saying a final prayer when Victor (Stephen Moyer, True Blood) runs in as blood pours out of his gunshot wound. Gun to his head, Fr Peter must listen to a dying man's confession, bringing up a past he had forgotten.

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: Enter this blood-soaked nightmare at your own risk. When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital. Now Carter must lead the survivors on a hellish voyage in a bid to survive! Totally mind-bending!

programme.title: Rome in Love
programme.desc: Amelie high profile role, to play Audrey Hepburn's character in a remake of Roman Holiday has gained press attention. Can she keep her identity under wraps whilst in Rome? (2019)

programme.title: Love Blossoms
programme.desc: A perfumer's daughter works to meet the production deadline for her late father's company's latest scent which is missing one elusive ingredient. Starring Shantel VanSanten (2017)

programme.title: Love on the Vines
programme.desc: (2017) A charming, full-bodied romantic comedy with Margo Harshman. When a lawyer is forced to spend six weeks on a vineyard in order to inherit it, unexpected romance becomes the sweetest vintage.

programme.title: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: Jamie Spellman struggles to balance her dream of painting with the reality of such a difficult career choice, while having to choose between two men who seem perfect, but for very different reasons.

programme.desc: Single mum Lizzy has built boundaries at work and personal life to protect herself. After meeting an impulsive pilot, Charlie, at work, will she be open to change and open herself up to love? (2019)

programme.title: Love In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: On the verge of losing her wildlife refuge, Sam, along with the town's handsome newcomer, Austin, risk it all to save an injured white wolf.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Ophelia
programme.desc: A dynamic and lavish re-imagining of Shakespeare's 'Hamlet' starring Daisy Ridley, Naomi Watts and Clive Owen.

programme.desc: After Nicholas' father dies and leaves the Familyy penniless, the Nickleby Family moves to London to stay with their Uncle Ralph. Ralph turns abusive and separates the family.

programme.desc: Monica Barrett learns she is on the President's shortlist.

programme.desc: Alex, post her mom's murder, aims to normalize life for her siblings.

programme.title: A Killer Upstairs
programme.desc: Wealthy businesswoman murdered, man's mother investigates, uncovers affair.

programme.title: Surviving Abduction
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment.

programme.title: Judicial Indiscretion
programme.desc: Monica Barrett learns she is on the President's shortlist.

programme.title: Undercover Angel
programme.desc: When a little girl prays for a miracle to help her recently divorced mother settle in their new town and fixer-upper house, an angel posing as a handyman, is sent down from heaven to help. While trying to accomplish his mission, the angel falls for the mother, ultimately forcing him into the unlikeliest of choices.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Widowed doctor Jessica vacations in Fiji with her daughter and finds love with resort owner Will.

programme.title: The Love Club: Lauren
programme.desc: Lauren faces divorce papers but has a feeling that it's not quite over, so she asks the Love Club for help.

programme.title: Abduction of Angie
programme.desc: Paramedic Miranda races to save her daughter Angie, who was kidnapped by Miranda's estranged father.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: You're Jinxed, Friend You've Met Sacramento
programme.desc: This fast-moving tale revolves around the kidnaping of a boxer's daughter. The boxer pays the ransom money but the girl is still not released. Her boyfriend decides to get her back his own way, killing her ruthless captor in a fierce duel.

programme.title: A Coffin from Sartana
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal massacre, the legendary hero Sartana is ready to do some investigating. Almost everyone in the tiny town of Indian Creek seems eager to buy up the property left behind by the murder victims, ...

programme.title: Dead Men Don't Make Shadows
programme.desc: Feared bounty hunter Lazar arrives in a gold-mining town to blackmail ex-bandit Barrett, now a ruthless mine owner. Followed by a young gunfighter with his own motive, Lazar forges an uneasy alliance. But as tensions rise, it becomes clear that not everyone is after gold—some seek justice, others revenge.

programme.title: The Bounty Killer
programme.desc: A tenderfoot becomes a bounty hunter in the hopes of making a better future for himself and his new love.

programme.title: Alive or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Sparrows Can't Sing
programme.desc: Sparrows Can't Sing is Joan Littlewood's bawdy, boisterous and touching picture of Cockney life, made on the spot by people whose roots are in the East End of London.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: The Divorce of Lady X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine
programme.desc: The story revolves around one weekend in the Crompton household.

programme.title: Passport to Shame
programme.desc: When the innocent-faced Malou, having been framed with a crime in Paris, arrives at a sordid brothel in England, it seems that she is condemned to a miserable and soul-destroying life...

programme.title: Springtime
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: B grade Twenties (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: "Kyeo-re," a 4th-year student majoring in film directing at an art school, pours her heart and soul into her graduation film screenplay one morning, only to have it stolen by her former boyfriend and senior in the same major, "Hyun-soo." Shocked and devastated, Kyeore quickly begins preparing a new screenplay. Imperfect as it may be, it brings together a group of graduation film team members, capturing their growth and love story.

programme.title: Whispering Corridors 6 : The Humming (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Ha-young hears humming in the empty washroom and believes that Eun-hee, who was hired as a vice-principal of the school is somehow linked to the mystery.

programme.title: Little Brother (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: A warming and touching drama about a 9-year-old troublemaker who suddenly starts behaving himself believing that being good can save his ill brother.

programme.title: Jazzy Misfits
programme.desc: Sun-deok is visited by her mother abruptly. And She finds her younger sister had vanished with their savings.

programme.title: Very Ordinary Couple
programme.desc: Former couple goes tit for tat after a bitter break up going into a deeper spiral of love and hate.

programme.title: Moonlit Winter
programme.desc: Sae-bom finds a mysterious love letter sent to her mom Yun-hee. This letter makes her wonder about Yun-hee.

programme.title: My Mother, The Mermaid
programme.desc: Na-young who arrives at her parents' hometown to find her father is shocked to meet her 20-year old mother.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: Tuck, Munch and Alex are a trio of inseparable friends who long for adventure. One day the boys find a cryptic signal on their phones and convinced that it is part of something bigger they set out on a quest to find the source.

programme.title: The Unseen
programme.desc: A man who abandoned his family now risks everything to find his missing daughter, including exposing the secret that he is becoming invisible.

programme.title: Mystery 101
programme.desc: (2019) Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a tech whiz behind a crime-solving app is found dead, a sharp-minded professor follows the digital trail to uncover the killer.

programme.title: Mystery 101
programme.desc: Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a young writer reopens an old case, a determined professor races to prove her colleague's innocence - before the truth is buried for good.

programme.title: Mystery 101
programme.desc: (2019) Mystery starring Jill Wagner. When a rising star receives a chilling death threat, a quick-thinking professor steps into the spotlight to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job
programme.desc: (2017) True crime story with Larry Lamb. A group of old-time criminals attempt to pull off the biggest heist in British history. Also starring Joely Richardson and Phil Daniels.

programme.title: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: (2011) Thriller starring Rachael Leigh Cook. A brilliant engineer's design is stolen and patented by her colleague. When he's found murdered, she becomes the prime suspect and must fight for her life.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Amish Abduction
programme.desc: Amish wife and mother Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves the word of the Amish to live among “normal Americans,” or the “English” as the Amish dub them. But things turn even more dire when her husband returns, seeking custody of their son, and is willing to kill to achieve his goal…

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Nothing But The Truth
programme.desc: Nothing but the Truth is an edge-of-your-seat political thriller starring Kate Beckinsale, Vera Farmiga and Matt Dillon. Washington DC political journalist Rachel Armstrong writes an explosive story about a government scandal in which she reveals the name of a covert CIA agent.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The War Below
programme.desc: During World War I, a group of British miners are recruited to tunnel underneath no man's land and set bombs from below the German front in hopes of breaking the deadly stalemate of the Battle of Messines.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in harsh conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A teenager wanders into Carmel, California, where he is soon introduced to the art-forgery community.

programme.title: Vice
programme.desc: In his new film VICE, Adam McKay sets his sights on another true story, that of one of the most elusive and secretive minds in modern American political history, Dick Cheney, joining forces with Christian Bale in another transformational performance.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: Director Simon West and Nicolas Cage team-up for the first time since the 1997 blockbuster CON AIR for STOLEN, a unique fast paced action thriller that takes place during 10 frantic hours on Mardi Gras day in New Orleans.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

Based on actual events - A group of 5 people find themselves trapped in an elevator in the World Trade Center's North Tower on 9/11. They work together, never giving up hope, to try to escape before the unthinkable happens.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: American born Casey has dedicated his life to studying the ancient art of Ninjutsu in Japan. Casey's training is put to the test when his Sensei asks him to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest that contains the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.
